subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by the Wronged One unto His Afnán, who hath believed in Him and in His signs, and hath quaffed the choice wine of revelation from the chalice of His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لافنانه الذی آمن به و بآیاته و شرب رحیق الوحی من کأس عطائه و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @Manifestation of God as sun, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for parents, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
